allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); active=[e for e in data if not e['isClosed']]; print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}, Active: {len\(active\)}, Closed: {len\(data\)-len\(active\)}'\); print\('First active:', json.dumps\(active[0] if active else {}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Count: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(f'{e[\\"title\\"][:60]} | closed={e[\\"closed\\"]} | endDate={e[\\"endDate\\"][:10]}'\) for e in data[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); active=[e for e in data if not e['isClosed']]; print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}, Active\(not closed\): {len\(active\)}'\); [print\(f'{e[\\"ticker\\"]} | {e[\\"companyName\\"]} | EPS={e[\\"epsEstimate\\"]} | Prob={e[\\"probability\\"]}% | Date={str\(e[\\"earningsDate\\"]\)[:10]}'\) for e in active[:8]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('Has GD:',  'General Dynamics' in content\); print\('Has IMAX:', 'IMAX' in content\); print\('Has 財報日曆:', '財報日曆' in content\); print\('Has 超預期:', '超預期' in content\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('Has EPS:', 'EPS' in content\); print\('Has Polymarket link:', 'polymarket.com/event' in content\); print\('Has probability:', 'probability' in content.lower\(\) or '%' in content\)")
